nasb.text: Saul said, “Draw near here, all you chiefs of the people, and investigate and see how this sin has happened today.

esv.text: And Saul said, “Come here, all you leaders of the people, and know and see how this sin has arisen today.

cnv.text: 掃羅說：“民間的眾領袖啊，你們都要走近這裡來；你們要查看今天我們犯了甚麼罪。

ccb.text: 扫罗说：“你们这些百姓的首领到这里来，我们要查出今天究竟谁犯了罪，
